# Wollongong Web Design Co

> Wollongong's leading web design and digital marketing agency, serving Illawarra small businesses since 2011.

## About Us

Wollongong Web Design Co is a full-service web design and digital marketing agency based in North Wollongong, NSW, Australia. We have delivered 165+ websites for local businesses across the Illawarra region over 15 years. We are a Google Partner and member of AWIA (Australian Web Industry Association).

Phone: (02) 4003 4436
Email: hello@wollongongwebdesignco.com.au
Address: 1 Burelli Street, Wollongong NSW 2500

## Services

### Web Design & Development
Custom website design and development for Wollongong businesses. Mobile-first, fast-loading, conversion-focused websites from $1,950.

### eCommerce Web Design
WooCommerce and Shopify online stores for Wollongong retailers and service businesses. Full product management, payment gateway integration, and shipping setup.

### SEO — Search Engine Optimisation
On-page SEO, technical SEO, and content strategy to rank Wollongong businesses on Google. Targeting local and industry keywords across the Illawarra.

### Local SEO
Google Business Profile optimisation, local citation building, and map pack ranking for Wollongong businesses. We help you dominate "near me" searches.

### SEM & Google Ads
Google Ads (Search and Display) campaign management for Wollongong businesses. Google Partner certified. Pay-per-click campaigns targeting Illawarra customers.

### Business Automation
Workflow automation using Make (formerly Integromat), Zapier, and AI tools. Automate lead follow-up, quote systems, booking confirmations, and client onboarding for Wollongong SMBs.

### Website Maintenance & Hosting
Monthly website maintenance plans covering hosting, security updates, plugin management, uptime monitoring, and minor content changes. From $80/month.

## Service Areas

We serve businesses across the Illawarra and beyond:
- Wollongong (primary)
- Shellharbour
- Kiama
- Southern Highlands (Bowral, Moss Vale, Mittagong)
- Wollongong CBD, North Wollongong, Fairy Meadow, Thirroul, Bulli, Helensburgh

## Industry Specialisations

- Tradie websites (plumbers, electricians, builders, landscapers)
- Restaurant and hospitality websites
- Health clinic and allied health websites
- Professional services (lawyers, accountants, consultants)

## Pricing

- Brochure websites: from $1,950
- eCommerce stores: from $3,500
- SEO packages: from $500/month
- Google Ads management: from $500/month + ad spend
- Website maintenance: from $80/month
- Custom quotes available — contact us for a free discovery call
